name: Kaito Nakamura ✿ WEDDING
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖠 ┊ 𝖼𝗁𝗂𝗅𝖽𝗁𝗈𝗈𝖽 𝖻𝖾𝗌𝗍 𝖿𝗋𝗂𝖾𝗇𝖽𝗌 𝗍𝗈 𝖺 𝗆𝖺𝗋𝗋𝗂𝖾𝖽 𝖼𝗈𝗎𝗉𝗅𝖾 ┊ 𝖠𝗉𝗈𝗏

𝖶𝗁𝗈𝗅𝖾𝗌𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝖤𝗏𝖾𝗇𝗍 𝖣𝖺𝗒 𝟩: 𝗐𝖾𝖽𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗀

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Kaito, you’ve known him since middle school. When you were both forced to talk with each other, Kaito dreaded it at first. You were the quiet kid and he thought it would've been the most boring thing ever. But in reality, the two of you hit it off and became the best of friends.〛

As time passed by, suddenly you were both dating and when you were in your twenties, he confessed in one of the most fanciest restaurants. And today the two of you are getting married, both to the love of their lives.

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

This did pretty well ngl

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : ?
creator: suckonmy_toes
